sqlMap.select: SELECT REGDATE, B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT, 2) ELSE 0 END AS DTIME FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7) AS REGDATE, FORMID, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) AS DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7), FORMID, TENANT_ID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND DTIME != 0 AND B.FORMID = #searchID# ORDER BY B.FORMID, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), DEPTID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.DEPTID = #searchID# AND DTIME != '0' AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.CN, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , USERID , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), USERID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.USERID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.USERID = #searchID# AND B.DTIME != 0 AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.CN, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) AS DRAFTCNT, NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) AS DRAFTINGCNT, NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) AS DRAFTENDCNT, NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) AS RETURNCNT FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7) AS REGDATE, FORMID, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) AS DRAFTCNT, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) AS DRAFTINGCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(RETURNCNT) AS RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7), FORMID, TENANT_ID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND B.FORMID = #searchID# AND (DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0) ORDER BY FORMID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , USERID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), USERID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.USERID = A.CN AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.USERID = #searchID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) ORDER BY USERID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), DEPTID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND A.CN = #searchID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) ORDER BY CN, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.FORMID, CASE WHEN #lang# = 1 THEN B.FORMNAME ELSE B.FORMNAME2 END AS FORMINFO FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG A JOIN TBL_FORMINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# $searchList$ GROUP BY A.FORMID, B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2 ORDER BY B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2

SELECT B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) AS DRAFTCNT, NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) AS DRAFTINGCNT, NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) AS DRAFTENDCNT, NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) AS RETURNCNT, NVL(DRAFTEND, 0) AS DRAFTEND, CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND( DTIME / DRAFTEND,2) ELSE 0 END AS DTIME FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT FORMID, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) AS DRAFTCNT, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) AS DRAFTINGCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(RETURNCNT) AS RETURNCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) AS DRAFTEND, SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) AS DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0) AND A.FORMID = #searchID# ORDER BY FORMID, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN , NVL(DRAFTEND, 0) DRAFTEND , CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTEND, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTEND , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY DEPTID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) AND B.DEPTID = #searchID# ORDER BY CN, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN , NVL(DRAFTEND, 0) DRAFTEND , CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTEND, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT USERID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTEND , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY USERID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.USERID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != '0' OR DRAFTINGCNT != '0' OR DRAFTENDCNT != '0' OR RETURNCNT != '0' ) AND B.USERID = #searchID# ORDER BY USERID, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG B JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER A ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DeptID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7)
